name: create_noc_connection
full_help:
create_noc_connection

Description: 
Create NOC Connection.

Syntax: 
create_noc_connection  -source <arg> -target <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose] [<path>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -source     Source NOC Interface.
  -target     Target NOC Interface.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<path>]    NOC Connection path.

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
